title: VoodooDall
description: Voodoo - A Curse Born from the Dark
body:
Voodoo - A Curse Born from the Dark

Once the sun goes down, peace shatters.

The Voodoo Dolls crawl out of the shadows — eerie human-shaped figures stitched from bloodied cloth and hatred. They have five terrifying forms, each more grotesque than the last. With hollow eyes and cursed needles, they silently hunt you down. No matter where you hide, they will find you.

If they reach you… you won’t survive.

But for the bravest players, there's hope. Each defeated form drops a unique piece of its cloth. Collect all five, and you'll unlock the ability to craft your very own Voodoo Companion — a creature born from fear itself.

But be warned…
No ally can protect you forever.
Once the night falls… there is no turning back.

🔧 Requires: GeckoLib (1.20.1) to work properly
🧵 Supports custom animations, sounds, and night-based events
